LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JASON ALLEN-ROUMAN, TERRY ALLEN-ROUMAN; NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO REMOVE MECHANIC'S LIEN. APPEARANCES: FOR DEFENDANT. NO ARGUMENT AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING-MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIEN GRANTED. CONTRACTOR FAILS TO ESTABLISH PROBABLE VALIDITY OF REMAINING AMOUNTS HE CLAIMS ARE DUE.
